description: Sign up/sign in module with Stripe embedded checkout for monthly/yearly subscriptions

userStories.title: Create Stripe configuration and environment setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Stripe configured so the app can process subscriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/config/stripe.ts with publishable key and price IDs
Create .env.example with VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, VITE_STRIPE_PRICE_MONTHLY, VITE_STRIPE_PRICE_YEARLY placeholders
Create .env.local with actual test keys from stripeConfig above
Add @stripe/stripe-js package to dependencies
Add stripe package to dependencies for server-side
Update .gitignore to exclude .env.local
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Stripe config created with env vars, packages installed, .env files set up

userStories.title: Create auth context and state management
userStories.description: As a developer, I need auth state management so components can access user authentication status.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx with AuthProvider component
Context provides: user object, isAuthenticated boolean, isLoading boolean
Context provides: signIn, signUp, signOut functions
Store auth state in localStorage for persistence
User object has: id, email, name, subscriptionStatus fields
Wrap App with AuthProvider in main.tsx
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: AuthContext created with user state, signIn/signUp/signOut functions, localStorage persistence, and updateSubscriptionStatus helper

userStories.title: Create sign-in page UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign in to my account so I can access my subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/SignIn.tsx page component
Dark theme matching existing site design (bg-black, text-white)
Email input field with validation (required, valid email format)
Password input field with validation (required, min 8 chars)
Sign In button with gradient styling (pink to purple)
Link to Sign Up page for new users
Link to forgot password (can be placeholder)
Form uses react-hook-form with zod validation
Show error messages for invalid inputs
Add route /signin in App.tsx above catch-all
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using /web-dev skill
userStories.notes: SignIn.tsx created with dark theme, email/password validation via zod, gradient button, links to signup and forgot password

userStories.title: Create sign-up page UI
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to create an account so I can subscribe to the service.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/SignUp.tsx page component
Dark theme matching existing site design
Name input field with validation (required)
Email input field with validation (required, valid email)
Password input field with validation (required, min 8 chars)
Confirm password field with validation (must match)
Create Account button with gradient styling
Link to Sign In page for existing users
Form uses react-hook-form with zod validation
Show error messages for invalid inputs
Add route /signup in App.tsx above catch-all
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using /web-dev skill

userStories.title: Create pricing plan selection component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to choose between monthly and yearly subscription plans.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/PricingPlans.tsx component
Display two plan options: Monthly ($XX/mo) and Yearly ($XX/yr)
Yearly plan shows savings badge (e.g., 'Save 20%')
Toggle or tabs to switch between monthly/yearly view
Selected plan has highlighted border/styling
Each plan card shows: price, billing period, features list
Select Plan button on each card
Dark theme with gradient accents matching site design
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using /web-dev skill

userStories.title: Create checkout page with plan selection
userStories.description: As a user, I want a checkout page where I select my plan before payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/Checkout.tsx page component
Include PricingPlans component for plan selection
Show order summary section with selected plan details
Continue to Payment button (disabled until plan selected)
If not authenticated, show sign-in/sign-up prompt first
Store selected priceId in component state
Add route /checkout in App.tsx above catch-all
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using /web-dev skill

userStories.title: Create API endpoint for Stripe checkout session
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a server endpoint to create Stripe checkout sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create api/create-checkout-session.ts serverless function
Function accepts POST with priceId and customerEmail in body
Creates Stripe checkout session with mode: subscription
Sets success_url to /checkout/success?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}
Sets cancel_url to /checkout
Returns session URL for redirect
Uses STRIPE_SECRET_KEY from environment
Add express and cors packages if needed for local dev
Create simple server.js for local API testing
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: Integrate Stripe checkout redirect
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be redirected to Stripe checkout to complete payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/stripe.ts with loadStripe initialization
Create src/hooks/useCheckout.ts hook for checkout logic
Hook calls API endpoint with selected priceId
Hook handles loading and error states
On success, redirect to Stripe checkout URL
Update Checkout.tsx to use useCheckout hook
Show loading spinner during redirect
Show error toast if checkout creation fails
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: Create checkout success page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a confirmation after successful payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/CheckoutSuccess.tsx page component
Parse session_id from URL query params
Display success message with checkmark icon
Show subscription details (plan name, next billing date placeholder)
Manage Subscription button (placeholder for Stripe portal)
Go to Dashboard/Home button
Update user auth context with subscriptionStatus: active
Add route /checkout/success in App.tsx above catch-all
Dark theme matching site design with success green accent
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using /web-dev skill

Component checks isAuthenticated from auth context
If not authenticated, redirect to /signin with return URL
If loading, show loading spinner
If authenticated, render children
